positive: A minimalist, highly contrasting illustration of a roaring wild feline (such as a leopard or jaguar) set against a geometric, stylized jungle backdrop. The silhouette should be bold and clean, rendered with thick lines and negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and cream. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a central apparel print. High contrast, vector-art aesthetic, pop-art influence, clean outlines, no gradients. Artwork style: Modern Tribal Chic. Composition: Full-body central figure, symmetrical elements surrounding the subject. Lighting: Flat, dramatic studio light.
negative: blur, ugly, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, noise, grain, low detail, photo, realistic photograph
